cases.scene_goal: Establish the inheritance question with restrained suspicion and public-safe ambiguity.
cases.conflict: A legal hesitation delays the answer while the oldest family member counters with guarded politeness.
cases.dialogue_seed: Everyone wants the answer tonight, but no one is willing to say the first true sentence out loud.
cases.setting_suffix: Rain taps the office blinds while the lamp on the archive desk hums softly.

cases.scene_goal: Intensify corridor pressure around the unsigned document without revealing the secret heir.
cases.conflict: A hallway exchange turns sharp when the attorney refuses to confirm the family rumor.
cases.dialogue_seed: If the paper matters this much, why did everyone pretend it was ordinary yesterday?
cases.setting_suffix: The corridor smells faintly of wet wool, old wood, and cooling tea.

cases.scene_goal: Leave a lingering afterimage around the inheritance ledger while preserving all reveal boundaries.
cases.conflict: A ledger entry appears harmless, but it rearranges who feels safe enough to speak.
cases.dialogue_seed: The number itself is small; the silence around it is what makes the room tilt.
cases.setting_suffix: A cold draft slips under the study door and stirs the edge of the ledger page.
